legacy_unstamped_ammonia_gamma_probe.reason: pre-SPGLIB-production-path probe without job_provenance.json stamps; never counted or collected

protocol.cell_optimization: native Bloch SPGLIB-reduced k222 KEEP_ANGLES, seeded only by the matching GXTB Gamma restart
protocol.energy_convergence_check: native Bloch SPGLIB-reduced k444 single point on the matching final GXTB k222 geometry
protocol.fixed_reference_diagnostic: optional frozen-crystal Gamma/k111/k222/k333 single points; excluded from production defaults
protocol.gamma_preoptimization: independent GXTB Gamma CELL_OPT from the X23b reference crystal
protocol.kpoint_mesh_contract: GXTB uses the same SPGLIB-reduced CP2K MACDONALD meshes as GFN1/GFN2 (SYMMETRY T, FULL_GRID F, SYMMETRY_BACKEND SPGLIB, SYMMETRY_REDUCTION_METHOD SPGLIB); CP2K expands to and folds from the complete mesh
protocol.legacy_full_grid_policy: pre-SPGLIB GXTB full-grid outputs are diagnostics only and are never accepted as production results
protocol.monomer_reference: independent GXTB gas-phase BFGS GEO_OPT in a 30 angstrom non-periodic cell
protocol.reported_lattice_energy: native Bloch SPGLIB-reduced k333 single point on the matching final GXTB k222 geometry
protocol.resume_policy: GXTB skips and collectors require matching input/output hashes and the complete frozen CP2K/save_tblite campaign fingerprint; BUSY and STALE_OUTPUT are failures
protocol.scc_mixer: SCC_MIXER TBLITE (native save_tblite complete-Fock potential DIIS)

save_tblite.static_library_role: explicit build-time archive fingerprint; no runtime-link inference is made
